message:
fix(tests): fix caut provider count and agentmail server dependency

- Update TestSupportedProviders to expect 6 providers (claude, codex,
  gemini, cursor, windsurf, aider) matching the updated
  SupportedProviders() function.

- Fix TestUpdateSessionActivityTargeting to not fatal on MCP server
  errors. The test validates local timestamp updates which succeed
  independently of the server. The server call fails in unit test
  environments where test projects are not provisioned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
